description: You are a Network Operations Center (NOC) analyst managing a capacity crunch at 2 AM. You need a triage dashboard that automatically surfaces the worst offenders across CPU, temperature, and disk I/O. Create a Graphite dashboard named exactly 'NOC Triage Board' containing three specific graphs. The graph titled exactly 'Hottest Servers' must use the highestCurrent() function to display the 2 CPU metrics with the highest current values from the pattern servers.*.cpu.*. The graph titled exactly 'Temperature Alert Zone' must include the raw temperature reading (servers.datacenter.machine_temperature) and a threshold() function set to 80 with the label 'Critical Threshold'. The graph titled exactly 'Sorted Disk Activity' must include disk write metrics (servers.ec2_instance_*.disk.write_bytes) sorted by peak values using sortByMaxima() and wrapped in aliasByNode() with an index of 1 to show only the instance name. Save the dashboard when complete, ensuring all names and titles match exactly.
